final.title: Temporary Cloudflare Accounts for AI agents
final.summary: Temporary Cloudflare Accounts for AI agents The announcement says this is "for AI agents" but (as is pretty common these days) the AI hook isn't really necessary, this is an interesting feature for everyone else as well. Short version: you can now create a Cloudflare Workers project and run this, without even creating a Cloudflare account: npx wrangler deploy --temporary Cloudflare will deploy the application to a new, ephemeral project which will stay live for 60 minutes.
